user_stories.goal: I want to enter a destination, trip length, budget level, and interests so that the system can generate a personalised day-by-day travel itinerary
user_stories.benefit: So I receive a ready-to-follow plan tailored to my constraints and preferences
acceptance_criteria: A form or API accepts destination, start date or start-day, trip length (days), budget level (low/medium/high) and a list of interests
Input is validated and clear error messages are returned for missing/invalid fields
The system returns a day-by-day itinerary where each day lists 3–6 activities or visits
Returned itinerary respects trip length, incorporates stated interests, and filters suggestions consistent with the budget level
Itinerary includes estimated times or time windows for each activity and a short description for each item

user_stories.goal: I want to view the generated itinerary on the website with map and details so I can easily follow and visualise my trip
user_stories.benefit: So I can plan logistics and see locations spatially without leaving the app
acceptance_criteria: Website displays the itinerary in a clear day-by-day layout with activity names, times, descriptions and estimated durations
Each activity links to a map marker and clicking an activity highlights its location on the map
Map shows all day activities with markers and supports pan/zoom; hovering a marker shows a short activity summary
The page is responsive and usable on mobile and desktop viewports
User can export or print the itinerary as a simple printable view (PDF or print stylesheet)

user_stories.goal: I want to save, name, and later edit my generated itineraries so I can refine plans and reuse them
user_stories.benefit: So I can keep customised plans and iterate on them without re-entering all preferences
acceptance_criteria: Authenticated users can save an itinerary with a title and optional notes
Saved itineraries are listed in a user dashboard sorted by creation or modified date
Users can open a saved itinerary, make edits (reorder, add/remove activities, change times) and save updates
Changes to a saved itinerary are versioned or provide an option to overwrite vs. create new copy
Unauthenticated users receive a prompt to sign up or are offered a temporary local save option (e.g., download JSON)

user_stories.goal: I want a Flask API endpoint that accepts trip parameters and returns a machine-readable itinerary so I can integrate the service with other apps
user_stories.benefit: So third-party apps or scripts can programmatically generate and retrieve itineraries
acceptance_criteria: A documented POST endpoint (e.g., /api/itineraries) accepts JSON input with destination, trip length, budget, interests and returns JSON
Successful responses use HTTP 200 and include a structured itinerary: days array, each with activities (name, description, start_time, duration, coordinates)
Validation errors return appropriate 4xx status codes with machine-readable error messages
API returns consistent schema and content-type application/json and supports pagination or size limits for large responses
API responses are generated deterministically for the same input (or document variability) and include a request_id for tracing

user_stories.goal: I want to manage the database of points of interest and settings for activity selection so recommendations stay accurate and relevant
user_stories.benefit: So tourists get up-to-date, high-quality suggestions aligned with our offerings and constraints
acceptance_criteria: Admin interface or secured API supports CRUD operations on points of interest with fields: name, category, description, coordinates, opening hours, price range, tags
Changes to POIs are reflected in newly generated itineraries within a defined propagation window (e.g., immediately or documented delay)
Admin can configure prioritisation rules (e.g., weight by popularity, proximity, or budget compatibility) that affect suggestion ordering
All admin actions require authentication and are audited (record user, timestamp, change summary)
POI entries validate required fields and prevent duplicate coordinates+name entries
